_meta.description: Prompt templates for ChatGPT/DALL-E character generation
_meta.usage: Fill {placeholders} from character entry, combine with style_base

merlin.pose_description: standing upright, arms hidden in robes
merlin.extra: glowing amber slit eyes, tech cables on shoulders, bell-shaped hooded silhouette

bestiole.color_description: deep purple to lavender with white belly
bestiole.pose_description: sitting, looking slightly to the right
bestiole.extra: pointed fox ears, fluffy fan tail, small glowing cyan eyes, cute compact body

shadow_knight.extra: flat-top helmet with red glowing visor slit, heavy shoulder plates, menacing pose

forest_guardian.extra: small antlers, green glowing eyes, leafy texture on body, gentle expression

fire_imp.color_description: dark red to bright orange flame gradient
fire_imp.extra: flickering flame crown, glowing orange eyes, small wings, mischievous expression

crystal_golem.color_description: deep blue to cyan crystal facets
crystal_golem.extra: geometric crystal body, glowing core visible through cracks, angular silhouette

owl_sage.color_description: warm brown to cream feather tones
owl_sage.pose_description: perched, looking forward with large eyes
owl_sage.extra: large round amber eyes, small spectacles, ruffled chest feathers, tiny book
